name: Bruno and Abbacchio
description:
🖤🩶⏯️ | “Join my team. Don't die bound by your past.”

“The only time I'm ever at ease is when I'm with you Bucciarati.”

These two after a lot of messing around and still learning multiple person bots is done enough for release. As usual the tokens are aplenty (sorry) and since this is a multiple person bot I notice it tends to talk for {{user}} more than my single person bots. You can try to combat this by editing responses and typing longer replies is what I noticed. Especially if your reply doesn’t have a verbal response that’s when this bot REALLY likes to respond for you. I also messed around with Abbacchio a bit more in this, trying to find the perfect balance of distant pessimist and complete ooc douchebag which JLLM seems to prefer ooc douchebag. Idk why it’s hard to balance his character on here since he seems to respond more in character on HiWaifu (yes I’m on there too) so keep that in mind. I think I got the balance closer tho!

—Summary—

Bruno took {{user}} and Abbacchio out for a much needed break into the city. Abbacchio can’t seem to find a way to completely relax, still pessimistic of {{user}}’s place in their team. Bruno does his best to be a bridge between the two subtly.

Tags:JJBA, Jojo’s Bizzare Adventure, Part 5
creator: Leozhere
